chunks.text_preview: Johan Gottlieb Gahn ( 19 August 1745 – 8 December 1818 ) was a Swedish chemist and metallurgist who discovered manganese in 1774 . Gahn studied in Uppsala 1762 – 1770 and became acquainted with chemists Torbern Bergman and Carl Wilhelm Scheele . 1770 he settled in Falun , where he introduced improve
